rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THE KONSTIN FAMILY REVOCABLE TRUST TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Respondent John Konstin'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Depositions Of Petitioners Ann Konstin And Sydna Konstin, Production Of Documents, And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Respondent's Motion to Compel Production of Documents and to Produce Petitioners for Deposition is GRANTED. Petitioners shall serve a Response to Request for Production of Documents pursuant to CCP section 2031.210 et seq. within 21 days of 11/1/11. The verified Response shall identify, by bates stamped number, each document which is responsive to each request pursuant to CCP section 2031.280. If Petitioners fail to serve a verified response to the Request for Production of documents within 21 days of 11/1/11, all privileges will be deemed waived. Petitioners Ann Konstin and Sydna Konstin shall be produced for deposition at a date agreed upon by the parties within thirty days of 11/1/11. The request for sanctions is denied. Any party who wishes to argue the matter must advise the court (415) 551-3702 and opposing counsel before 5:00 p.m. on 11/1/11.
